interfaces.visual_interface: Markdown mobile UI readiness report and PNG overlay previews

exit_codes.0: no findings at selected fail threshold

recommended_commands.purpose: Create a Markdown mobile UI report
Create a screen-by-screen mobile readiness matrix
Create a readiness matrix using visual-smoke viewport definitions
recommended_commands.command: godot-mobile-ui-doctor matrix mobile-ui.json --visual-smoke-plan reports/visual-plan.json --format markdown --output reports/mobile-ui-matrix.md

recommended_commands.purpose: Join mobile UI metadata with localization stress-pack output
Combine mobile UI and related mobile release reports
recommended_commands.command: godot-mobile-ui-doctor readiness mobile-ui.json --input-report reports/input-map.json --export-report reports/export.json --mobile-perf-report reports/mobile-perf.json --format markdown --output reports/mobile-readiness.md
